---
title: "Sıla ÇELİKTAŞ YALÇINKAYA"
sidebar: false 
---

![](assets/images/vesikalik.jpeg){fig-align="center"}

# Eğitim

-   B.S.,Electrical and electronics Eengineering, Gazi University, Turkey, 2017-2022.
-   M.S., Engineering Management, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2025 - ongoing.
-  
# İş Tecrübesi

## Employements

1.  ENERJISA, Junior Engineer, 2022

2.  ASELSAN, System Enggineer, 2022-ongoing

## Internships

1.  AYDEMİR, 2020

2.  ASELSAN, 2021

# Projects

1.  TUBİTAK 1001..........................

# Publications

1.  Celiktas, S., Inan, A., Aksoy, İ.,  (2022) “EMI Filter Design with Passive Components for Power Lines”, IEEE.

# Competencies

 Java, C++, Python

# Hobbies
